Our Mission

Built on Service,
Driven by Knowledge

Patriot Scholar Press exists to publish books that matter — works of practical wisdom, academic rigor, and patriotic conviction that help Americans of all ages navigate life with purpose and clarity.

Founded in New Braunfels, Texas in 2026, Patriot Scholar Press is an imprint of MJHW Holdings, LLC. We believe that education and service to country are not competing values — they are the same value, expressed differently.

From practical guides for young adults stepping into the world after high school to scholarly works on law enforcement, leadership, and American civic life — every title we publish carries a message worth passing on.

An imprint of MJHW Holdings, LLC · New Braunfels, Texas

Our Catalog

Books That Build Character

Titles written and published for those who believe learning is a lifelong duty — not just a diploma requirement.

Featured Release · 2026

Patriot Scholar Press

Chasing the Dream: Strategies for Success After High School

Dr. John Harrison Watts, PhD

A practical, faith-rooted guide for young adults at life’s crossroads. Drawing on decades of service as a police officer, soldier, professor, and city commissioner, Dr. Watts delivers actionable strategies for navigating college, career, investment, and purpose.

Buy Now — $19.99
ISBN: 979-8-9968584-0-8

Scholarly Edition

Routledge Publishing

Policing America’s Educational Systems

Edited by John Harrison Watts

A rigorous academic examination of the intersection between law enforcement and education in America. An essential resource for criminal justice scholars, educators, administrators, and policymakers navigating campus safety.

Buy on Amazon →
ISBN-13: 978-1-351651769

Academic Textbook

CRC Press · Taylor & Francis Group

Law and Society: An Introduction

John Harrison Watts & Cliff Roberson

A foundational introduction to the relationship between law and the social forces that shape it. Co-authored with Cliff Roberson, this widely adopted textbook is an indispensable resource for law, criminal justice, and social science students.

Buy on Amazon →
ISBN: 978-1-4665-8329-0

About Dr. Watts

“Your limitations don’t define you — your drive does.”

Dr. John Harrison Watts has lived the American Dream in every sense. A decorated police officer, U.S. Army soldier, Texas State Guard Chief Warrant Officer 4 (CW4), university professor, city commissioner, and entrepreneur — Dr. Watts brings a uniquely multidimensional perspective to everything he writes and every stage he graces.

He holds a PhD and has spent his career not only serving his community but mentoring the next generation of scholars, leaders, and patriots through the McNair Scholars Program and graduate education. He is the founder of The Conflict Ref, LLC, and the driving intellectual force behind Patriot Scholar Press.

Dr. Watts’s published works span practical life guidance, criminal justice scholarship, and legal studies — a body of work that reflects the full range of his service and expertise. He resides in Texas, where he continues to teach, write, mentor, and chase a few dreams of his own.

Law Enforcement & Public Safety
Military Leadership
Higher Education & Mentoring
Real Estate & Entrepreneurship
City Government & Civic Leadership
Youth Motivation & Life Strategies
Read His Books Book Dr. Watts to Speak

Speaking Engagements

Bring Dr. Watts to Your StageInspiring audiences from classrooms to conference halls

Dr. John Harrison Watts is an electrifying and deeply credentialed speaker whose life story — from patrol officer to PhD, from soldier to professor — commands a room. He delivers keynotes, workshops, and commencement addresses that leave audiences ready to act.

Whether you’re planning a leadership summit, a university convocation, law enforcement training, or a community event, Dr. Watts brings energy, expertise, and authenticity to every engagement.

For Authors

Publish Your First Book

Turn Your Manuscript Into a Published Book

Have you always dreamed of becoming a published author? Whether you've written a memoir, leadership book, business guide, devotional, military history, or personal story, Patriot Scholar Press is here to help you bring your manuscript to life.

We specialize in helping first-time authors navigate the publishing process from start to finish. Publishing a book can seem overwhelming — but you don't have to do it alone. We'll walk beside you every step of the way.

Your story matters. Let us help you share it with the world.

Our Publishing Partnership

One-Time Investment

$1,295

Flexible Payment Plan Available

★  $395 to begin your project

★  Three monthly payments of $300

No hidden fees. No surprise charges.

Schedule Free Consultation

What Is Included

🤝

Personal Publishing Coach

You'll work directly with Patriot Scholar Press throughout the process. We'll answer your questions, explain each step, and help you make informed decisions.

✏️

Professional Editing

Your manuscript will be professionally edited to improve grammar, punctuation, readability, and overall presentation while preserving your unique voice.

📐

Interior Book Design

We professionally format your manuscript for publication, creating a clean and polished interior that meets Amazon publishing standards.

🎨

Custom Book Cover Design

Every book receives a professionally designed front cover, spine, and back cover that reflects your vision and appeals to readers.

📖

ISBN Registration

We'll secure an ISBN for your book and ensure it is properly registered for publication.

📦

Amazon Publishing

Your book will be published on Amazon KDP in Kindle eBook, Paperback, and Hardcover (optional).

👤

Amazon Author Page

We'll help you create or enhance your Amazon Author Central profile so readers can learn more about you and your work.

🚀

Book Launch Strategy

We'll provide a practical launch plan to help you introduce your book to family, friends, colleagues, and your community.

⭐

Featured Author

As a Patriot Scholar Press author, you'll be featured on our website with your author biography, book information, and purchase links.

Why Choose Us

Why Patriot Scholar Press?

There are many companies that can publish a book. We believe the best publishers do much more than upload files to Amazon.

At Patriot Scholar Press, every author deserves a trusted guide who will answer questions, provide encouragement, and make the publishing process understandable.

Our goal: To help ordinary people accomplish the extraordinary goal of becoming published authors.
